strengths: ~15 years of polyglot full-stack engineering across web, mobile, desktop, and embedded systems
Current exposure to AI-agent infrastructure including MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks at re:cinq
Entrepreneurial track record as founder of GISCollective, an open-source geo-data platform with real adopters
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML product leadership, published research, or recognized AI expertise expected at Principal/Director IC level
Limited evidence of cloud-platform strategy work or advising strategic customers/partners at executive scale
Career titles cap at Staff/Senior Software Engineer with no prior Principal-level scope or org-wide technical influence

key_factors.factor: Recognized AI expertise and AI-built products
Principal/Director-level IC scope and external influence

response.justification: The role demands a Director-level IC with recognized AI expertise, cloud-platform strategy fluency, and the gravitas to advise strategic customers — competencies the résumé only partially meets. AI exposure is recent and tooling-oriented (MCP generators at re:cinq since April 2025) with no shipped AI products, research, or platform-scale evidence. Cloud experience is limited to AWS CDK usage at Optilyz rather than cloud-product strategy. Strong craftsmanship, polyglot delivery, and the GISCollective founder story show builder fluency and entrepreneurial drive, but the seniority signal stops at Staff/Senior, well below Principal scope.
